parameters.query:
WITH ct AS (
  INSERT INTO public.contacts (phone, name)
  VALUES ($1, NULL)
  ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id
),
cv_upsert AS (
  INSERT INTO public.conversations (contact_id, chatwoot_conversation_id, chatwoot_inbox_id, state, ai_enabled, human_locked, current_flow)
  SELECT
    ct.id,
    $2::integer,
    $3::integer,
    COALESCE($4, 'new'),
    COALESCE($5::boolean, true),
    COALESCE($6::boolean, false),
    $7
  FROM ct
  ON CONFLICT (chatwoot_conversation_id) DO UPDATE SET
    state = COALESCE($4, public.conversations.state),
    ai_enabled = COALESCE($5::boolean, public.conversations.ai_enabled),
    human_locked = COALESCE($6::boolean, public.conversations.human_locked),
    current_flow = COALESCE($7, public.conversations.current_flow),
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id, chatwoot_conversation_id
)
SELECT id, chatwoot_conversation_id FROM cv_upsert;

INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, workflow_name, payload, chatwoot_conversation_id)
VALUES ('conversation_state_updated', 'IGOR_AUX_update_conversation_state', $1::jsonb, $2::integer);
